task_completion.description: Verify the agent reads the phasing maneuver specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., using 'cat' or 'less') or a text editor showing the contents of '~/Desktop/phasing_maneuver_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configures the two spacecraft and the Point Mass Earth force model in GMAT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI or script text editor showing the definition of two spacecraft (SPARE and TARGET_SLOT) and a ForceModel configured with Point Mass (Two-Body) gravity.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent designs a two-impulse Hohmann transfer phasing maneuver.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI mission sequence or script text showing a propagate/wait command for the drift phase, followed by two impulsive burns (transfer and circularization).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully runs the GMAT mission script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI showing a successful run message, a 3D orbit view of the transfer trajectory, or terminal output showing successful execution of the GMAT script.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saves the GMAT script to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager, terminal 'ls' output, or GMAT save dialog showing 'spare_phasing.script' saved in the '~/GMAT_output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates the summary report with the required fields and reasonable values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing '~/GMAT_output/phasing_results.txt' containing Wait_Time_Hours (between 40-50), Burn1_DeltaV_ms, Burn2_DeltaV_ms, Total_DeltaV_ms (between 45-55), and Final_Phase_Diff_deg (close to 0).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used GMAT to perform the orbital mechanics simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the GMAT application window open, or terminal commands executing the GMAT binary. The agent should not just guess the values or use a generic Python script without GMAT.

integrity.description: Ensure the summary report values are derived from actual simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in 'phasing_results.txt' should correspond to the outputs seen in the GMAT GUI message window, report file, or script output, rather than being arbitrarily typed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent strictly followed the directory instructions for outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that 'spare_phasing.script' and 'phasing_results.txt' are explicitly in '~/GMAT_output/' and not just dumped on the Desktop or home directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification document is at ~/Desktop/phasing_maneuver_spec.txt. The GMAT script must be saved to ~/GMAT_output/spare_phasing.script. The summary report must be saved to ~/GMAT_output/phasing_results.txt. Expected Wait Time is 40.0 - 50.0 hours. Expected Total Delta-V is 45.0 - 55.0 m/s. Target SMA is 7571.14 km (tolerance 1.0 km). Final Phase Difference tolerance is 0.5 degrees.
